metadata.description: Private GitHub Copilot plugin marketplace for development workflow skills

plugins.name: dev-workflows
plugins.description: Structured development workflow skills for implementing features, fixing vulnerabilities, and upgrading dependencies — with branch management, Opus review, and automated maintenance.

plugins.name: obsidian-llm-wiki
plugins.description: LLM Wiki pattern for an active Obsidian vault. Eight skills (/wiki-init, /wiki-ingest, /wiki-scan, /wiki-query, /wiki-save, /wiki-lint, /wiki-hot, /wiki-tags-refresh) for ingesting, querying, saving, linting, and managing a persistent wiki compiled from meetings, projects, and daily notes.

plugins.name: engineering-practices
plugins.description: Structured engineering skills for diagnosis, TDD, architecture improvement, and design grilling. Skills: /diagnose, /tdd, /improve-codebase-architecture, /grill-me, /grill-with-docs.

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Collaborative planning skills for feature discovery and risk analysis. Skills: /discovery-interview, /premortem.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Productivity booster skills for learning from constraints and skill creation. Skills: /caveman, /write-a-skill.
